tweets.full_text:
The creators of SWE-Bench just dropped a really simple new benchmark every LLM gets 0% on.

ProgramBench asks: can models recreate real executable programs (ffmpeg, SQLite, ripgrep) from scratch with no internet?

We are far from saturated on model quality. https://t.co/LrYfNLrpms
tweets.summary: SWE-Bench团队发布ProgramBench基准测试，所有LLM得分0%。考察模型从零开始重建真实可执行程序（ffmpeg、SQLite、ripgrep）的能力，揭示模型质量仍有巨大提升空间。
angles: 所有LLM都0分：ProgramBench基准测试的真相

tweets.full_text:
I gave the same task to GPT-5.5 xhigh and Opus 4.7 max.

 – GPT took ~30 minutes.
 – Opus took ~2 hours.

Then I asked them to review each other's work and give an honest verdict on which was better.

 – GPT said its own code was better.
 – Opus said there was no obvious winner.
tweets.summary: 开发者对比GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7在代码任务上的性能，GPT-5.5速度快30分钟，但两者对自己的代码评价存在差异。
